storage_account = "baubaisadfsastg"

# voters_transformed is Delta keep old strutcure of the addresses colums with duplicates values
voters_transformed_path = f"abfss://juror-etl@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/voters_transformed"
df_transformed = spark.read.format("delta").load(voters_transformed_path)
df_transformed.createOrReplaceTempView("voters_transformed")

# voters_postgresql is plain Parquet
voters_postgresql_path = f"abfss://juror-etl@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/voters_postgresql"
df_postgresql = spark.read.parquet(voters_postgresql_path)
df_postgresql.createOrReplaceTempView("voters_postgresql")

print(f"voters_transformed: {df_transformed.count()} records")
print(f"voters_postgresql:  {df_postgresql.count()} records")

# How many records have postcode-shaped values in each address column?
spark.sql("""
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN address2 RLIKE '^[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][A-Z0-9]?\\\\s?[0-9][A-Z]{2}$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pc_in_address2,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address3 RLIKE '^[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][A-Z0-9]?\\\\s?[0-9][A-Z]{2}$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pc_in_address3,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address4 RLIKE '^[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][A-Z0-9]?\\\\s?[0-9][A-Z]{2}$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pc_in_address4,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address5 RLIKE '^[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][A-Z0-9]?\\\\s?[0-9][A-Z]{2}$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pc_in_address5
    FROM voters_transformed
""").show()

# How many records have duplicate values across address columns?
spark.sql("""
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN address2 IS NOT NULL AND address3 IS NOT NULL
                 AND UPPER(TRIM(address2)) = UPPER(TRIM(address3)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a2_a3,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address2 IS NOT NULL AND address4 IS NOT NULL
                 AND UPPER(TRIM(address2)) = UPPER(TRIM(address4)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a2_a4,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address3 IS NOT NULL AND address4 IS NOT NULL
                 AND UPPER(TRIM(address3)) = UPPER(TRIM(address4)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a3_a4,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address4 IS NOT NULL AND address5 IS NOT NULL
                 AND UPPER(TRIM(address4)) = UPPER(TRIM(address5)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a4_a5
    FROM voters_transformed
""").show()

# Show 20 sample records matching your example pattern
spark.sql("""
    SELECT address, address2, address3, address4, address5, zip
    FROM voters_transformed
    WHERE address2 IS NOT NULL AND address3 IS NOT NULL
      AND UPPER(TRIM(address2)) = UPPER(TRIM(address3))
      AND address4 RLIKE '^[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][A-Z0-9]?\\\\s?[0-9][A-Z]{2}$'
    LIMIT 20
""").show(truncate=False)

spark.sql("""
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN address2 IS NOT NULL AND address3 IS NOT NULL
                 AND UPPER(TRIM(address2)) = UPPER(TRIM(address3)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a2_a3,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address3 IS NOT NULL AND address4 IS NOT NULL
                 AND UPPER(TRIM(address3)) = UPPER(TRIM(address4)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a3_a4
    FROM voters_transformed
""").show()

spark.sql("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total_records,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address4 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS address4_populated,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address4 RLIKE '^[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][A-Z0-9]?\\\\s?[0-9][A-Z]{2}$'
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS address4_is_postcode,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address4 RLIKE '^[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][A-Z0-9]?[0-9][A-Z]{2}$'
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS address4_postcode_no_space,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address4 RLIKE '^[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][A-Z0-9]? [0-9][A-Z]{2}$'
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS address4_postcode_with_space
    FROM voters_transformed
""").show()

storage_account = "baubaisadfsastg"
voters_postgresql_path = f"abfss://juror-etl@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/voters_postgresql"

df_pg = spark.read.parquet(voters_postgresql_path)
df_pg.createOrReplaceTempView("voters_postgresql")

print(f"voters_postgresql total records: {df_pg.count()}")

# Same diagnostic as before, but on voters_postgresql
spark.sql("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total_records,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address4 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS address4_populated,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address4 = 'UNKNOWN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS address4_unknown,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address4 RLIKE '^[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][A-Z0-9]?\\\\s?[0-9][A-Z]{2}$'
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS address4_is_postcode,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address2 IS NOT NULL AND address3 IS NOT NULL
                 AND UPPER(TRIM(address2)) = UPPER(TRIM(address3))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a2_a3,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address3 IS NOT NULL AND address4 IS NOT NULL
                 AND UPPER(TRIM(address3)) = UPPER(TRIM(address4))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a3_a4
    FROM voters_postgresql
""").show()

# Check the most recent run's date range in voters_postgresql
spark.sql("""
    SELECT
        MIN(creation_date) AS earliest,
        MAX(creation_date) AS latest,
        COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTR(creation_date, 1, 8)) AS distinct_dates,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM voters_postgresql
""").show(truncate=False)

# Check if recent records still have postcodes in address4
spark.sql("""
    SELECT
        SUBSTR(creation_date, 1, 8) AS date_key,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address4 RLIKE '^[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][A-Z0-9]?\\\\s?[0-9][A-Z]{2}$'
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pc_in_address4
    FROM voters_postgresql
    WHERE creation_date IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY SUBSTR(creation_date, 1, 8)
    ORDER BY date_key DESC
    LIMIT 20
""").show()

spark.sql("""
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN address2 IS NOT NULL AND address3 IS NOT NULL
                 AND UPPER(TRIM(address2)) = UPPER(TRIM(address3)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dup_a2_a3,
        SUM(CASE WHEN address4 RLIKE '^[A-Z]{1,2}[0-9][A-Z0-9]?\\\\s?[0-9][A-Z]{2}$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pc_in_a4
    FROM voters_postgresql
""").show()
